# Pre-Delivery Quality Checklist — Andersseen Web Components

Run through every item before shipping any component. **All boxes must be checked.**

---

## ♿ Accessibility

- [ ] Correct ARIA `role` on container and all interactive elements
- [ ] `aria-expanded` reflects open state on trigger
- [ ] `aria-haspopup` set correctly (`"menu"`, `"dialog"`, `"listbox"`, `"true"`)
- [ ] `aria-controls` links trigger to panel via matching IDs
- [ ] `aria-labelledby` or `aria-label` on panel/dialog
- [ ] `aria-describedby` on dialog pointing to description element
- [ ] Full keyboard navigation implemented (↑↓ navigate, Enter select, Esc close, Tab close, Home/End jump)
- [ ] **Focus returns to trigger on close** — always
- [ ] Focus trap active for modal-type components (dialogs, drawers)
- [ ] `aria-disabled="true"` on `<Host>` when disabled (in addition to HTML `disabled`)
- [ ] Disabled items have `aria-disabled="true"` and `pointer-events-none` — they remain focusable
- [ ] Type-ahead implemented for menus with many items
- [ ] Mental walkthrough with NVDA/VoiceOver: open → navigate → select → close
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` overrides all `--and-duration-*` to `0ms`

---

## 📐 API & DX

- [ ] Every `@Prop()` is typed (no `any`) and has a default value
- [ ] Both **controlled** (consumer passes `open` prop) and **uncontrolled** (internal `@State`) modes work
- [ ] `@Watch` guard: `if (newVal === oldVal) return;`
- [ ] All `@Event()` emitters have typed payloads (no `any`)
- [ ] Events fire **after** state update, not before
- [ ] Public methods via `@Method()`: `show()`, `hide()`, `toggle()` where applicable
- [ ] `@Method()` functions are `async`
- [ ] JSDoc on **every** `@Prop`, `@Event`, `@Method`, slot (`@slot`), part (`@csspart`), and CSS var (`@cssprop`)
- [ ] Component JSDoc includes `@example` block with realistic HTML

---

## 🎨 Theming

- [ ] Component uses only `--and-*` semantic tokens — no raw colors, no Tailwind palette classes
- [ ] All consumer-overridable properties defined as `--[component]-*` vars on `:host` in the CSS file
- [ ] Every CSS var has a sensible default referencing `--and-*` tokens
- [ ] Works correctly in **light** mode
- [ ] Works correctly in **dark** mode (test both `@media prefers-color-scheme: dark` and `.dark` class)
- [ ] CSS `::part()` selectors exposed for deep customization — every `part="..."` is documented

---

## 🧩 Slots & Composition

- [ ] Default slot provides "main content" behavior
- [ ] Named slots documented with `@slot` JSDoc
- [ ] Fallback content provided where appropriate (e.g. `<slot name="empty"><p>No items</p></slot>`)
- [ ] `slotchange` handled when slot presence affects layout (e.g. conditional icon padding)
- [ ] Sub-components (`and-[name]-item`, `and-[name]-separator`) are standalone custom elements with own ARIA

---

## 🛠 Code Quality

- [ ] `disconnectedCallback` removes **ALL** listeners added in `connectedCallback` / `componentDidLoad`
- [ ] No `any` types anywhere in the component file or types file
- [ ] No direct DOM mutation (`innerHTML`, `setAttribute` calls bypassing the reactive system) — use Stencil's `@State` and JSX
- [ ] `shadow: true` on `@Component` decorator — no exceptions
- [ ] `formAssociated: true` only when component participates in forms; `internals.setFormValue()` called on change
- [ ] CVA used for any component with 2+ visual variants
- [ ] No hardcoded z-index numbers — always `var(--and-z-*)` tokens
- [ ] Generated IDs use `Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)` pattern (not sequential integers)
- [ ] No unreachable `TODO` or `FIXME` comments in delivered code

---

## 📖 Documentation & Storybook

- [ ] `and-[name].stories.ts` created with `Default` and `AllVariants` stories minimum
- [ ] Storybook `argTypes` configured for all key props
- [ ] `readme.md` auto-generated by Stencil (or manually updated) reflects current API

---

## Severity Guide

| Issue                                  | Severity | Block delivery?                   |
| -------------------------------------- | -------- | --------------------------------- |
| Missing ARIA role or aria-expanded     | Critical | ✅ Yes                            |
| Focus not returning to trigger         | Critical | ✅ Yes                            |
| `any` type                             | High     | ✅ Yes                            |
| Missing `disconnectedCallback` cleanup | High     | ✅ Yes                            |
| Hardcoded color (not using token)      | High     | ✅ Yes                            |
| Missing JSDoc on prop/event            | Medium   | ⚠️ No (but document before merge) |
| Missing Storybook story                | Low      | ⚠️ No                             |
